_comment: DEPRECATED 2026-06-02 — RETAINED FOR HISTORICAL REFERENCE ONLY. The canonical workspace catalog now lives in D1 (`restream_workspaces` table + `pods.restream_workspace_id` FK, migration 0027) and is served at `GET /v1/restream-workspaces` via the Gateway. To add a new workspace or move a pod between workspaces, INSERT into D1 + UPDATE the pod row — do NOT edit this file. Original purpose: maps Restream Studio workspace names to the pod-ids that live in each workspace. The Restream API is implicitly scoped by whichever workspace the authenticated session has active, so the poller uses this to fence which shows/events each --workspace instance touches. Pod-ids must be a strict partition — no pod-id may appear in multiple workspaces. `redirectPort` is the loopback port used by `restream-inspect --auth --workspace <name>` for the OAuth redirect URI; each workspace MUST use a unique port so concurrent auth flows / refresh-token grants don't collide on the same callback URI registered with the Restream OAuth app. Add the matching `http://localhost:<port>/callback` URL to the Restream OAuth app's allowed redirect URIs before authing a workspace for the first time.
